title: BEM-866 classify aftercommit fail
objective:
Run script:
"""
result = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json')
data = json.loads(result.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if result.exists() else {}
stderr = str(data.get('stderr') or '')
stdout = str(data.get('stdout') or '')
status_value = str(data.get('status') or '')
text = (stderr + '\n' + stdout + '\n' + status_value).lower()
if not result.exists():
    code = 'RESULT_MISSING'
elif 'could not resolve to a workflow' in text or 'not found' in text or '404' in text:
    code = 'WORKFLOW_NOT_FOUND'
elif 'does not have workflow_dispatch' in text:
    code = 'NO_WORKFLOW_DISPATCH'
elif 'unexpected inputs' in text or 'invalid input' in text or 'provided' in text:
    code = 'INVALID_INPUTS'
elif 'workflow is not valid' in text or 'yaml' in text or 'syntax' in text:
    code = 'WORKFLOW_YAML_INVALID'
elif 'permission' in text or '403' in text or 'resource not accessible' in text:
    code = 'PERMISSION_DENIED'
elif '422' in text or 'unprocessable' in text:
    code = 'UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY'
elif status_value == 'DISPATCH_FAILED':
    code = 'DISPATCH_FAILED_UNKNOWN'
else:
    code = 'UNKNOWN'
slug_source = (stderr or stdout or status_value or 'empty')[:120]
slug = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in slug_source)[:80]
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_AFTERCOMMIT_FAIL_' + code + '_' + slug + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 aftercommit fail classification\nCode: ' + code + '\nStatus value: ' + status_value + '\n\nSTDERR:\n' + stderr[:3000] + '\n\nSTDOUT:\n' + stdout[:2000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('aftercommit fail classification: ' + code)
"""
No issue comments.
